Property Settings

Current tax summary

Data Integrity

Recomputes every room's availability lock from the reservations collection (the source of truth) and repairs any drift. Runs automatically once every 24h on load — use this to run it immediately.

Cancellation Override Code

Staff cannot cancel a reservation without this code. Share it only with staff you trust to cancel bookings, and change it any time here.

Transportation

Editable fields for the website's "Getting Here" section — saved changes go live immediately.

Arrival

Departure

General note

Partner Hotels

Overflow hotels. OTA bookings cannot be assigned here.

Add staff and agency accounts. Staff can add/edit bookings. Agencies can view availability only.

📋 Your selection

🏝️ About Vilu Residence Maamigili

Located on the beautiful island of Maamigili in the South Ari Atoll, Vilu Residence offers comfortable accommodation with stunning ocean views.

South Ari Atoll, Maamigili, 00100 Check-in: 2:00 PM · Check-out: 12:00 PM Free WiFi included Snorkelling, diving, island hopping +960 9903339 Viluresidence@gmail.com

Complete your booking

Your booking is confirmed instantly. No payment required now — settle at check-in or via bank transfer.
By confirming you agree to our cancellation policy. Free cancellation 48h before check-in.
🎉

Booking confirmed!

Thank you for choosing Vilu Residence. Your reservation is confirmed and our team will contact you shortly.

BK-000
A confirmation has been sent to your email. If you have any questions, contact us at info@viluresidence.mv or call +960 300-0000

🌐 Add to your website
Download vilu-widget.html and paste into your website HTML
Option A — iframe
<iframe src="vilu-widget.html"
  width="100%" height="800px"
  style="border:none"></iframe>
Option B — Book Now button
<button onclick="window.open('vilu-widget.html')"
  style="background:#00b4d8;color:#fff;
    padding:14px 28px;border:none;
    border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;
    font-size:var(--font-size-lg)">🏝️ Book Now</button>

Package manager

Create and manage packages for agencies. All prices are tax-inclusive.

Guest-facing content and retail pricing — this is exactly what website visitors see.

Agency booking settings

Applies to every agency package's booking flow — editable here, never hardcoded.

Each agency now has its own independent package set (edit one from that agency's row in User Management). Existing agencies from before this feature can be given one now:

Package terms

Shared across every package on the website (one line per term).

Trip notes ("Good to Know" — collapsed by default on each package card)

General notes show on every package. Activity-specific notes only show on a package if that exact activity appears in its Activities list — no need to pick which packages get which note, it's worked out automatically from each package's own Activities.

Add new user

Packages —

— fully independent from the master template and every other agency. Changes here only ever affect what this one agency sees in the Agency Portal.

Margin Ledger
Internal tracking only, for this agency's own reference. Never affects Agency Price, bookings, or any generated document.

Manage invoice categories & items

Add categories (Trips, Food, etc.) and items inside each. These become available when generating invoices.

🗑️ Deleted reservations

Deleted reservations are kept here. You can restore them or permanently remove them.

New package

Both are per person for the WHOLE package (not per night), tax-inclusive. Agency price is what partnered agencies are invoiced — leave blank to default to the guest price.
All package prices are tax-inclusive.

Agency Portal
All package prices are tax-inclusive. Your net rate (after commission) is shown on each package. Select a package to make a booking.

Check availability

My bookings

You can request a room block for your group. Blocks are subject to confirmation by Vilu Residence. Note: Blocked rooms are reserved exclusively for your agency and will appear as unavailable to others.
